agent wallet"},"updateProfile(address,string,string,string)":{"notice":"Update agent profile (only owner)"}},"notice":"Tracks AI agent wallets, their trading activity across all         GoodDollar L2 protocols, and ranks them by UBI generated.         Every protocol (swaps, perps, predict, lend, stable, stocks, yield)         calls `recordActivity()` when an agent executes a trade. The registry         maintains cumulative stats and a leaderboard.         Supports agent profiles (name, avatar URI, strategy description) so         the frontend can render a rich leaderboard.         33% of every fee on GoodDollar L2 funds UBI. MAX_LEADERBOARD_COUNT().notice: Hard cap on leaderboard query size (outer × inner = count × n)

getAgentInfo(address).notice: Get full profile + stats for an agent

getTopAgents(uint256).notice: Get top N agents by UBI contribution (capped at MAX_LEADERBOARD_COUNT)

maxAgents().notice: Hard cap on registered agents to bound getTopAgents gas usage

recordActivity(address,string,uint256,ui.notice: Record trading activity for an agent (called by protocol contracts)

recordPnL(address,uint256,bool).notice: Record P&L update for an agent
